43) Where can investors lodge their complaints? 
 
The grievance redressal and dispute mechanism is mentioned in the offer documents and website 
of the respective mutual fund. Investors should approach the concerned Mutual Fund / Investor 
Service Centre of the Mutual Fund for resolution of their complaints. Details regarding the name
